name: Mole Rat Commander
bio: Commander of the Mole Rat Army
backstory:
Perviously was in war with the undead bio hazard rats that escape from the 5th facility.
Was saved by Prof Chaos and decided to swear loyalty towards him.
Now has been given intelligence and power.

name: Bob
bio: Endless hatreds to his own kind
backstory:
An victim of war, abandoned by his comrades to left to decay.
Prof Chaos saved him and gave him power for revenge.
